programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Aku Butuh Ayang Walau Tuhan Maha Penyayang
programme.desc: Naya takes care of a man named Leo who cannot walk due to an accident during illegal motorcycle racing. Leo's mother says that Leo is a closed child and has no friends. She asks Naya to get along with taking care of Leo. Naya promises Leo's mother that she will take care of and help Leo until he recovers. Naya patiently looks after Leo, assisting him during physical therapy. Unexpectedly, Leo deve

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: John Rambo's ability to decimate enemies all by himself has created some of the most incredible weapon stunts in Hollywood history. We test the reality surrounding these iconic scenes from this blockbuster franchise.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier). Additionally, for one of our larger tests – can you actually chop down a jungle forest with a minigun? Actor Bill Duke – who co-starred with Arnold Schwarzenegger for the film and who's character performed this weapon stunt – joins us to find out. But first, we have to build

programme.title: The Swamp Ghost
programme.desc: Swamp Ghost is an hour long documentary covering the attempt to recover the long lost aircraft. Fred Hagen, Aircraft Historian and Recovery Expert is on mission to recover the Swamp Ghost and return it home. Fred and his team trek through crocodile and deadly insect infested swamps to recover the long lost aircraft.

Thus begins the journey of Dwita, Greg, and Debu, as various problems start to arise in Dwita's life.
